testcase.name: accepts a token signed with the current signing key
rejects a token signed with an unknown key when no previousKey is set
accepts a token signed with previousKey when TTL has not expired
accepts current-key token even when a valid previousKey is also present

testsuite.name: verifyJwtDualKey — previousKey outside or missing TTL window

testcase.name: rejects a token signed with previousKey when TTL window has already expired
testcase.classname: verifyJwtDualKey — previousKey outside or missing TTL window

testcase.name: rejects a token signed with previousKey when previousKeyExpiresAt is null
testcase.classname: verifyJwtDualKey — previousKey outside or missing TTL window

testcase.name: rejects a token signed with previousKey when ctx.previousKey is null
testcase.classname: verifyJwtDualKey — previousKey outside or missing TTL window

testcase.name: rejects a token signed with a completely unknown third key regardless of previousKey
testcase.classname: verifyJwtDualKey — previousKey outside or missing TTL window
